subcodes.first_line: O loved ones of God! God willing, may ye forever drink from the Kawthar of the peerless Beauty of the Most Exalted One, and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی انشاء الله لازال از کوثر جمال بی مثال حضرت متعال بیاشامید و از
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
